response.justification: Maria Rodriguez has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, including some C++ work at National Instruments. However, her primary focus has been on web, mobile, and embedded systems with languages like TypeScript, Node.js, and D. She lacks the depth of C++ experience, secure development lifecycle adherence, and industrial automation exposure required for this high-performance, security-critical role. Her lack of cloud platform solutions and industrial cybersecurity standards (e.g., IEC 62443) further widens the gap.
strengths: Strong object-oriented programming and software architecture skills
Experience with high-performance, low-latency applications (e.g., real-time metadata handling)
Proven track record in mentoring and technical leadership (e.g., organizing workshops and courses)
concerns: Limited hands-on C++ experience (only 6 months at National Instruments, not recent)
No demonstrated expertise in secure development lifecycle or industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443)
Lack of experience with industrial automation protocols (Modbus TCP/IP, OPC UA) or cloud platforms (Azure)

key_factors.factor: Secure Development Lifecycle and IEC 62443 compliance
